comments.original: Performance matters but doesn't always change biased minds - some folks cling to outdated views regardless of evidence shoved right under their noses! Seen it countless times where hard facts get ignored over baseless biases.

comments.original: The winding roads you roam in youth surely etch deep maps in your mind. Teaching has shown me that; kids today aren't so different despite tech's grip—it's place & tradition that shape 'em at heart even now - like it did me, steeped quietly yet profoundly by early surroundings from book-laden shelves to philosophies debated under old city streetlights during my formative years.

Teaching has shown me that; kids today aren't so different despite technology's influence—it's environment & tradition that shape 'em at heart even now - like it did me, steeped quietly yet profoundly by early surroundings from book-filled shelves to philosophies debated under streetlights during my formative years.
